differs_from_model_a_by: one removed central graphene carbon (single vacancy)

removed_carbon.selection_criterion: carbon nearest the graphene in-plane centroid

literature_basis: SV = remove one C atom (Si et al. [6], 'SV defects are created by removing a C atom'); methodology Sec. 5 'remove one central C atom for SV, keep all other variables identical to Model A' (Qin et al. [2]).
